meaning: n.模仿滑稽作品,拙劣的模仿vt.拙劣模仿
examples: It was like a parody of the balcony scene from Romeo and Juliet.
There seems to be something like a gentle parody, maybe even a mocking tone that fills the lines of the elder brother's ecstatic speech.
By the end of his life, Presley's vocals often descended close to self-parody.
It's as if someone was trying to parody right-wing narratives of government bureaucracy and incompetence.
Former Palm CEO Jon Rubinstein also got a parody Twitter account over the weekend.
